      Construct a VertexInfo object with the given metadata information.

    • Method Detail

      • create

        VertexInfo create​(StdString label,
                  @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFITypeAlias("GraphArchive::IdType") long chunkSize,
                  InfoVersion version,
                  StdString prefix)
        Construct a VertexInfo object with the given metadata information.
        Parameters:
        label - The label of the vertex.
        chunkSize - The number of vertices in each vertex chunk.
        version - The version of the vertex info.
        prefix - The prefix of the vertex info.

      • create

        VertexInfo create​(StdString label,
                  @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFITypeAlias("GraphArchive::IdType") long chunkSize,
                  InfoVersion version)
        Construct a VertexInfo object with the given metadata information.
        Parameters:
        label - The label of the vertex.
        chunkSize - The number of vertices in each vertex chunk.
        version - The version of the vertex info.

      • create
